extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won stage 3 sprint after KITTEL Marcel was led out too early by SABATINI Fabio and died in final 500m
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step led out KITTEL Marcel via SABATINI Fabio 500m too early, forcing Kittel into prolonged wind exposure before line
ALAPHILIPPE Julian holds second overall despite not being strongest time trialist, signaling defensive race management pre-TT stage
BARDET Romain actively defending KOM jersey on flat stage indicates team prioritizing secondary classification over GC energy conservation

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: perfectly timed sprint after rivals faded, beating superior sprinters through superior positioning and patience
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: pulled 500m from line by leadout, lacked fitness to maintain speed through prolonged wind exposure
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: already 15+ minutes down in overall, completely out of GC contention by stage 3
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: defending KOM on flat stage rather than conserving for mountains suggests non-GC tactical focus
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: second overall entering uphill TT despite mediocre time trial ability reveals strong opening positioning
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: 23 seconds down with uphill TT and mountains remaining positions him as protected Sky GC option
